Records.description: $n$-gon family, ngon_L7_massless. The one-loop $n$-gon (or $A_n$ polygon) has $n$ massless internal propagators arranged in a cycle with $n$ massless external legs. In $D = n$ dimensions the integral is finite and evaluates to the volume of a hyperbolic $(n{-}1)$-simplex (Davydychev-Delbourgo 1997). For $n = 3$ (triangle) the result involves Clausen functions; for $n = 4$ (box) it is the Murakami-Yano formula in 16 dilogarithms. The family includes the bubble ($n = 2$), triangle, box, pentagon, hexagon, heptagon, and octagon.
